title: dupatya glaucescens
intro: Dupatya glaucescens is a plant species known for its medicinal and aromatic properties, belonging to the family Apiaceae. The plant is used for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, which have been utilized in traditional medicine to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Dupatya glaucescens include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and provide relief from digestive issues. Herbal preparations of Dupatya glaucescens include essential oils, decoctions, and infusions, which can be used externally or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
